strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, demonstrating adaptability and broad skill set
Entrepreneurial mindset with experience founding and maintaining an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective) used by NGOs
Strong contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators
concerns: Lacks a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification for the role
Limited explicit evidence of deep AI/ML expertise or building AI-powered products/platforms at scale
No clear experience advising strategic customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption, a key responsibility
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a strong background in software engineering and infrastructure, with notable entrepreneurial and open-source contributions. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI/ML expertise and experience in strategic cloud/AI product development, which is not clearly demonstrated in the resume. While his work on AI-agent infrastructure is promising, it does not fully align with the required qualifications or responsibilities.
